PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIZULICH, JIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEONG, RYAN MATTHEW $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,500.00, THAT PLAINTIFF RYAN MATTHEW LEONG RECOVER THE SUM OF $6000.00 FROM DEFENDANT JIM FIZULICH, AND THAT EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
